name: Stuffed Meat Loaf II
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, salt, pepper, bread crumbs, raw eggs, and water thoroughly.
2. Pat the meat mixture flat onto a sheet of waxed paper to about 1 inch thick.
3. Layer hard-boiled eggs, salami, and ham; sprinkle with mozzarella, Parmesan cheese, garlic, and parsley.
4. Pick up the wax paper on one long end and roll into a jellyroll shape.
5. Pat firmly into a football shape and seal the ends.
6. Heat oil in a large frying pan and brown the meat loaf on all sides.
7. Gently lift out the meat loaf and place it in simmering tomato sauce to cook slowly for 30-45 minutes on low heat.
8. Serve sliced with pasta or rice.
